name: Claude Code
description: An agentic coding assistant CLI from Anthropic. It reads and edits files, runs shell commands, searches codebases, and completes multi-step engineering tasks from natural-language instructions in the terminal, desktop app, web, and IDE extensions.
evidence: Completed a multi-file refactor across a TypeScript codebase, updating imports and fixing resulting type errors without human intervention.
Asks for confirmation before destructive actions such as force-pushes or file deletion, via a user-selected permission mode.
Occasionally proposes overly broad edits on vague prompts; results improve markedly when the user states explicit success criteria.
Documentation covers installation, permission modes, hooks, MCP server integration, and memory; setup on Windows required no manual configuration.
Pricing is usage-based via Claude subscription plans; token consumption per session is visible but per-task cost estimation is left to the user.
